name: TSI Holdings Co.,Ltd.
summary: TSI Holdings Co., Ltd. plans, manufactures, sells, and imports clothing in Japan and internationally. It primarily offers men's, women's, and kid's wear. The company is also involved in the import, export, wholesale, and retail of clothing; and mail-order sales and e-commerce business, as well as production and logistics management activities. It serves specialty and department stores. The company was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
